scope: post-failure attribution of H1a coordinate underfitting; no model update and no H1b-H6

decision_rule.gradient_interference: coordinate shared-gradient cosine below zero identifies destructive multi-head interference
decision_rule.gradient_dominance: other-head shared-gradient norm substantially above the coordinate norm under global clipping identifies scale competition
decision_rule.boundary: The audit may motivate one separately frozen H1a repair. It cannot authorize H1b, tensor conditioning, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
